title: Pipe Flow Calculator - Calculate Flow Rate & Velocity
description: Free pipe flow calculator. Calculate flow rate, velocity, and pressure drop in pipes. Supports various pipe sizes and fluids.
keywords: pipe flow calculator, flow rate calculator, pipe velocity, water flow rate, pipe sizing
intro: Calculate flow rate, velocity, and volume in pipes. Enter pipe diameter and flow velocity or flow rate.

faq.q: How to calculate pipe flow rate?
faq.a: Flow Rate (Q) = Area × Velocity = π × (d/2)² × v. For a 2-inch pipe at 5 ft/s: Q = π × 1² × 5 = 15.7 in²·ft/s.

faq.q: What is the relationship between pipe size and flow?
faq.a: Flow rate is proportional to the square of the diameter. Doubling pipe diameter quadruples the flow capacity at the same velocity.
